construction.panels: Standard baseball jersey construction with set-in short sleeves and a full-button placket.
construction.seams: Standard flat seams throughout, no visible contrast stitching.
construction.closures: Full-front button closure with seven round, translucent white/grey buttons.
construction.details: V-neck collar. Orange piping detail runs vertically along the edge of the placket on both sides, and horizontally around the sleeve cuffs. The hem is a straight cut.

graphics.location: front chest, arching across the chest
graphics.size: approximately 12 inches wide x 4 inches tall

branding.primary_logo: Small, colorful SkyyRose logo (appears to be a moon/rose graphic) on a purple/pink background.
branding.secondary_marks: A rectangular woven label on the lower front right side of the jersey. It features a baseball-like graphic with 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' text above it, and additional smaller text below, all on an off-white background with black text and graphics.

fabric_appearance: Smooth jersey knit, likely a polyester blend, with a subtle sheen characteristic of athletic wear.
unique_features: The prominent 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' graphic on the front, the 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' woven label, and the specific orange and black colorway reminiscent of Oakland sports teams.
collection_aesthetic: This piece embodies Oakland grit and emotional expression through its bold statement and athletic-inspired design, aligning with SkyyRose's luxury streetwear identity. The color scheme pays homage to local culture while the 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' message adds a layer of social commentary and pride.
